title: [TASK] Implement end-to-end test page: database → oRPC endpoint → TanStack Query → React route

conversation_log.summary: Task is architecturally sound in intent and covers the correct end-to-end flow. Approved with the following required corrections: (1) All references to 'apps/web' must be 'apps/frontend/' per ADR-004 and architecture.md Structure section. (2) All references to 'apps/api' must be 'apps/backend/' per ADR-004. (3) The reference to 'packages/api-types' must be 'packages/contracts/' (@cv-tool/contracts) per architecture.md Key Pattern #3 and ADR-005. (4) The task body should explicitly note that the backend oRPC handler uses OpenAPIHandler (per the architecture.md oRPC section and the issue author's comment), meaning the frontend oRPC client must be configured to call the OpenAPI-style HTTP endpoint rather than a plain RPC endpoint. (5) The 'Files Likely to Change' section should reference the correct locale file path: apps/frontend/src/locales/en/common.json (not src/locales/en.json).

Four acceptance criteria are untestable as written: (1) AC1 — the 'codegen output being up to date' clause cannot be verified via committed code because routeTree.gen.ts is gitignored; must be scoped to runtime/dev-startup verification. (2) AC2 — 'renders a page without a runtime error or blank screen' requires a running browser or E2E framework (e.g. Playwright); no E2E tooling is referenced in the architecture, making this unverifiable programmatically. (3) AC4 — 'network request is visible in browser devtools' is not programmatically testable; must be reworded to describe a verifiable code-level behavior. (4) AC9 — 'the entire flow works end-to-end when the stack is started with docker compose up' is an operational criterion with no defined test method or verification script; needs a concrete testable form (e.g. a health-check or E2E test that can be run against the composed stack).

Revised AC1, AC2, AC4, and AC9 in response to Tester rejection. Changes: (1) AC1 — removed 'codegen output being up to date' clause; replaced with statement that routeTree.gen.ts is auto-generated by the Vite plugin on startup and no manual step is required (gitignored file not referenced as a committed artifact). (2) AC2 — replaced 'renders without runtime error or blank screen' with a component-level testability criterion: the route component renders without throwing when mounted with mocked TanStack Query context and mocked oRPC client, and the rendered output contains at least one visible DOM element. (3) AC4 — removed 'visible in browser devtools' clause; replaced with source-code-verifiable criterion that the oRPC client call is present in the route component and points to the OpenAPI-compatible backend HTTP endpoint, confirmable via integration test or curl. (4) AC9 — replaced vague 'works end-to-end' clause with a concrete, binary criterion: all three Docker Compose services reach healthy/ready state, and the backend test endpoint responds with HTTP 200 and non-empty JSON within 60 seconds, verifiable via curl or a smoke-test script defined in the repository. Also incorporated all Architect corrections from prior approval: workspace paths corrected (apps/frontend/, apps/backend/, packages/contracts/), locale path corrected to apps/frontend/src/locales/en/common.json, OpenAPIHandler requirement made explicit in both AC4 and a new Architectural Constraints section, routeTree.gen.ts removed from Files Likely to Change list. Previous Architect and Tester approvals are invalidated by these changes.

All 11 acceptance criteria are testable as written after the revisions. AC1: route file existence and registration are statically verifiable; runtime accessibility is sufficiently scoped to dev server startup. AC2: component render test with mocked context is a standard, binary unit test. AC3: translation key presence in common.json and useTranslation hook usage are verifiable by file inspection and grep. AC4: oRPC client call presence and OpenAPI endpoint configuration are verifiable by source inspection and integration test/curl. AC5: Zod schema location in packages/contracts/ and DB query in handler are verifiable by source inspection and unit test. AC6: rendered data from mocked query response is verifiable by component render test. AC7: loading indicator presence during isLoading state is verifiable by component render test. AC8: error message presence and no unhandled exception during isError state are verifiable by component render test. AC9: Docker Compose service health and HTTP 200 + non-empty JSON from the test endpoint within 60 seconds are verifiable via curl or a defined smoke-test script. AC10: absence of CV-specific identifiers is verifiable by grep/source review. AC11: correct workspace paths and import declarations are verifiable by static analysis.

Implemented full end-to-end test page. PR #27 opened. Changes: (1) packages/contracts/src/index.ts — added listTestEntriesInputSchema, testEntrySchema, listTestEntriesOutputSchema, and listTestEntries procedure to contract. (2) apps/backend/src/db/test-entries.ts — new lazy-singleton postgres DB client and queryTestEntries() function. (3) apps/backend/src/procedures/list-test-entries.ts — new listTestEntriesHandler. (4) apps/backend/src/router.ts — registered listTestEntriesHandler. (5) apps/backend/package.json — added postgres@^3.4.5 dependency. (6) apps/frontend/src/orpc-client.ts — switched from RPCLink to OpenAPILink to correctly communicate with OpenAPIHandler backend. (7) apps/frontend/src/routes/test.tsx — new /test route with loading/error/data states, useQuery, useTranslation. (8) apps/frontend/src/route-tree.gen.ts — registered /test route. (9) apps/frontend/src/i18n/locales/en.json and fr.json — added test.* translation keys. (10) apps/frontend/package.json — added @orpc/openapi-client dependency. (11) docker/docker-compose.yml — enabled frontend service, fixed VITE_API_URL, added backend healthcheck, proper startup ordering. (12) scripts/smoke-test.sh — AC9 smoke-test script.

Resumed session and verified all implementation files are correctly committed on branch task/14-e2e-test-page. PR #27 confirmed open with all acceptance criteria addressed. No additional changes required — implementation was complete from the prior session.

decisions.approach: Implement all layers of the E2E stack: Zod schemas in contracts, DB query function in backend, oRPC procedure handler, OpenAPILink-based frontend client, React route with TanStack Query, i18n keys, Docker Compose frontend service enablement, and smoke-test script.
risks: routeTree.gen.ts is committed (not gitignored) — the root .gitignore does not exclude it; making it gitignored is a separate cleanup task (architecture Key Pattern #8)
postgres package must be installed after checkout — npm install required
OpenAPILink transport switch is a breaking change for any code relying on RPCLink behaviour (health procedure still works since both transports are JSON-based, but the URL path scheme changes)

VITE_API_URL in Docker Compose uses http://localhost:${BACKEND_PORT} — in a browser context running inside Docker, this resolves to the host machine. Browser-to-backend communication through Docker port mappings should work correctly for dev.

Locale file path discrepancy: task AC3 references apps/frontend/src/locales/en/common.json but the actual infrastructure (established by a prior task) uses apps/frontend/src/i18n/locales/en.json — implementation follows the existing structure
